verses.text: The northern kings gather at the waters of Merom. The north. A great host assembles.
The northern kings gather at the waters of Merom. The north. A great host assembles.
The northern kings gather at the waters of Merom. The north. A great host assembles.
The northern kings gather at the waters of Merom. The north. A great host assembles.
The northern kings gather at the waters of Merom. The north. A great host assembles.
God says, 'Be not afraid'; Joshua routs them and houghs their horses. Routed. God gives the mighty host.
God says, 'Be not afraid'; Joshua routs them and houghs their horses. Routed. God gives the mighty host.
God says, 'Be not afraid'; Joshua routs them and houghs their horses. Routed. God gives the mighty host.
God says, 'Be not afraid'; Joshua routs them and houghs their horses. Routed. God gives the mighty host.
He takes Hazor and burns it. Hazor. The chief city falls.
He takes Hazor and burns it. Hazor. The chief city falls.
He smites all their cities and kings. Smitten. The land is taken.
He smites all their cities and kings. Smitten. The land is taken.
He smites all their cities and kings. Smitten. The land is taken.
Joshua did all as the LORD commanded Moses. Obedient. Nothing was left undone.
Joshua did all as the LORD commanded Moses. Obedient. Nothing was left undone.
Joshua did all as the LORD commanded Moses. Obedient. Nothing was left undone.
God hardened their hearts that they might be destroyed. Hardened. Judgment falls on the nations.
God hardened their hearts that they might be destroyed. Hardened. Judgment falls on the nations.
God hardened their hearts that they might be destroyed. Hardened. Judgment falls on the nations.
He cuts off the Anakim; the land rests from war. Rest. The conquest is complete.
